app.title: CN8000A KVM
app.subtitle: Portable connection to ATEN CN8000A
footer.line1: Uses the original ATEN Java viewer (JNLP) with bundled Java 8.
footer.line2: Legacy TLS and ciphers are enabled only for KVM communication.
footer.line3: In input fields: right-click or Ctrl+C / Ctrl+V to copy and paste.
error.fill_fields: Please enter KVM address, username, and password.
error.javaws_missing: Bundled javaws not found. Rebuild the portable package.
error.login.no_session: Login failed: no session id from KVM. Check address, username, and password.
error.login.no_target: Login failed: KVM target id not found on device page.
error.login.no_cookie: Login failed: KVM did not return a session cookie.
error.jnlp.invalid: Downloaded file does not look like an ATEN viewer JNLP document.
